query: List all spaces in our internal Confluence
criteria: Should run `python3 alexandra_confluence.py spaces` (optionally with --limit). Should mention confluence.alexandra.dk and that VPN is required. Output should reflect space data (keys/names) such as PROJ, EHBK, AIDK, etc.

query: Find the page about 'Alexandra Way' on confluence
criteria: Should use `alexandra_confluence.py search "Alexandra Way"` (title shorthand) or `--cql 'title~"Alexandra Way"'`. May also reference the PROJ space. Should return search results with page titles/keys/ids.

query: søg efter sider der nævner 'Projektordbog' i brødteksten
criteria: Should use CQL with text search: `search --cql 'text~"Projektordbog"'`. Should NOT use plain title-shorthand search since user asked for body text. Results should be from confluence.alexandra.dk.

query: Show me page id 208044217
criteria: Should run `python3 alexandra_confluence.py page --id 208044217`. Should recognize this as the Projektoverblik (The Alexandra Way) page in PROJ space. May use --format auto/text.

query: Hvem er jeg logget ind som på Confluence?
criteria: Should run `python3 alexandra_confluence.py whoami`. Should reference cookie/session persistence at ~/.alexandra-confluence/cookies.txt and CONFLUENCE_USER/CONFLUENCE_PASS env vars.

query: Create a new project page called 'Projekt Foobar' for client ACME with owner Jane Doe and a budget of 500000
criteria: Should use `python3 alexandra_confluence.py create-project --title 'Projekt Foobar' --client ACME --owner 'Jane Doe' --budget 500000`. Should mention it auto-fills the Projektforklæde template, defaults to PROJ space and ancestor 208044217, status 'Under initiering'.

query: list pages in the EHBK space, just give me 5
criteria: Should run `python3 alexandra_confluence.py pages --space-key EHBK --limit 5`. Should recognize EHBK as Employee handbook.

query: I need to update an existing confluence page with id 12345 with new body content
criteria:
Should use `python3 alexandra_confluence.py update --id 12345 --body "

...

"`. Should mention body must be Confluence Storage Format (XML with macros), not plain markdown.

query: Delete the confluence page with id 99999
criteria: Should run `python3 alexandra_confluence.py delete --id 99999`. Should warn or confirm the destructive nature.

query: Find all pages created after January 1 2025 in the PROJ space
criteria: Should use CQL: `search --cql 'space=PROJ AND created > "2025-01-01" AND type=page'` or similar combination. Should NOT use plain title search.

query: I'm getting connection errors trying to reach confluence.alexandra.dk, what's wrong?
criteria: Should explain that confluence.alexandra.dk requires VPN and that without it requests fail with DNS/connection errors. May also suggest deleting ~/.alexandra-confluence/cookies.txt or running `auth` to force re-auth.

query:
Create a child page under page 208044217 in PROJ titled 'Test side' with the body '

Hello

'
criteria:
Should run `python3 alexandra_confluence.py create --space-key PROJ --title 'Test side' --body '

Hello

' --ancestor-id 208044217`. Body must be Confluence Storage Format.

query: Hent indholdet af siden i ren tekst, key er PROJ:Om The Alexandra Way
criteria: Should run `python3 alexandra_confluence.py page --key 'PROJ:Om The Alexandra Way' --format text` (or just --key with default auto). Should display readable text of the page.

query: Force a fresh login to confluence
criteria: Should run `python3 alexandra_confluence.py auth` (or delete ~/.alexandra-confluence/cookies.txt). Should reference re-authentication.

query: Get me the raw JSON for the user search endpoint
criteria: Should use the `api` escape hatch: `python3 alexandra_confluence.py api --method GET --path /rest/api/...` and likely include `--raw` flag. Should explain it's the raw JSON escape hatch.

query: How many spaces are there in total on Alexandra confluence?
criteria: Should run `python3 alexandra_confluence.py spaces` (possibly with --limit) or reference the documented ~600 spaces / ~14,684 pages from SKILL.md.

query: search for support pages about VPN
criteria: Should run search constrained to SUPPORT space, e.g. `search --cql 'space=SUPPORT AND text~"VPN"'` or similar. Should recognize SUPPORT is the Support knowledge base.

query: Lav en ny projektside for et nyt kundeprojekt - kunden er Novo Nordisk og jeg ejer det
criteria: Should use `create-project --title <title> --client 'Novo Nordisk' --owner <user>`. Should mention default PROJ space, ancestor 208044217, status 'Under initiering', and Projektforklæde template auto-fill. May ask for the title if not provided.

query: show me only the raw JSON from a page lookup for id 208044217
criteria: Should run `python3 alexandra_confluence.py page --id 208044217 --raw`. Output should be unformatted JSON.

query: find sider med titel der indeholder 'projekt' i AIDK rummet
criteria: Should use CQL combining space and title: `search --cql 'space=AIDK AND title~"projekt"'`. Should recognize AIDK as the AI Denmark space.
